title: Market Context
description: Schema for market context output used by trading agents.

date.description: The date for this market context.

is_trading_day.description: Whether the market is open for trading on this date.

market_phase.description: Current phase of the trading day.

half_day.description: Whether this is a half trading day.

early_close_time.description: Early close time if half_day is true (e.g. '13:00').
